mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stats (menu, price, category, survey_date) VALUES (#{menu}, #{price}, #{category}, #{surveyDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price = IF(VALUES(survey_date) >= survey_date, VALUES(price), price), survey_date = GREATEST(survey_date, VALUES(survey_date))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stats WHERE menu LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY menu ASC, category ASC
